prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-RINGSIZESTICK-10IN Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: Universal Hobby Jewelry Making Tool Aluminum Ring Sizing Stick USA and EU Sizes Description: Make sure you're sizing your rings correctly with the Universal Hobby Aluminum Ring Sizing Stick.

This ring stock features both US and European sizes, making it a perfect tool for professional and hobby jewelry makers alike. The overall length is 10", so it will fit in most tool boxes and crafting carry cases. The US sizes are 1-15 (13mm - 24mm) and the European sizes are 41-76. It even has International sizes 1-36, so you'll be able to size just about any ring accurately. It's constructed of solid aluminum so you can count on it for years to come. Make sure you have one of these with your jewelry making tools for sizing, enlarging and reshaping rings. Search Terms: crafting jewelry making metal working ring sizing stick Features: - Ring Sizing Stick - Material: Solid Aluminum - US Sizes: 1-15/12mm-24mm - European Sizes: 41-76 - International Sizes: 1-36 - Must-have Tool for Resizing, Reshaping & Enlarging Rings === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Hobby 10in Aluminum Ring Sizing Stick

openai.item_name: Universal Hobby 10-in Aluminum Ring Sizing Stick

anthropic.title_differentiation: US Sizes 1-15, European Sizes 41-76, International Sizes 1-36, Solid Aluminum

openai.title_differentiation: US European And International Sizes, Accurate Sizing, Resizing, Enlarging And Reshaping, Solid Aluminum
